creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
I for one like this and would like to see this usefully generic construct further developed. I view GitHub as a suspicious monopoly with a pernicious and unfortunate stranglehold on the open source community, and GitLab merely as a lesser demon of equal liability. I welcome any facility which enables or promotes decentralization and exodus from Git{Hub,Lab} no matter how small its immediate impact.

That being said, I can already see that without --no-checkout the `git clone` operation here will potentially end up running executables of dubious trustworthiness from .git/hooks prior to any sort of source validation being done by the ports infrastructure.
